title: Ginger joins family — adoption / arrival
prompt: Wide five-shot in the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights, beige sectional couch in background, warm orange lamp glow. @Mama kneeling at left holding a soft blanket. @Papa standing center. @Sara about 5yo here at right with arms open. @Eva about 1yo here in @Mama's lap. @Ginger trotting through the doorway center toward the family, tail WAGGING wildly, mouth SMILES open-tongue happy, legs RUN. The new family addition. Lands in the open right arms. Laughing hard. Tiny hand from the lap REACHES to pet the puppy's head. Warm smile from center. Papa: "Welcome home, Ginger."
